# Varman Constructions

Varman Constructions is the premier supplier of high-quality building materials in Tamil Nadu. We specialize in M-Sand, Blue Metal, Cement, and Bricks. With over 200+ completed projects since 2020, we guarantee fast delivery and superior quality for all construction needs.

## Contact Information
- **Phone**: +91 77084 84811
- **Address**: Near HP Petrol Bunk, Porulur - 624616 in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.
- **Website**: https://varmanconstructions.in

## Products and Services
- Premium M-Sand
- P-Sand
- Blue Metal
- Cement
- Bricks
- Size Stones
- AAC Blocks

## Delivery
We offer 24-48 hour delivery across Tamil Nadu.
